---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for CryptoSkill
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Type

- [ ] Skill improvement (enhance an existing skill)
- [ ] Platform feature (website, tooling, infrastructure)
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Other

## The Goal / Use Case

Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the use case you want to enable.

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Potential Implementation (Optional)

If you have ideas about how this could be implemented, describe them here.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references that help explain the request.
